name: Makakoyumi
description: Notes For absolute damage, this is easily the best bow in the game. Its main shot is essentially a Clockwork Repeater with +20% damage, more range, and much faster shot velocity, without even counting the extra side shot. Even if you never hit the side shot, it beats all bows except the 5-shot Predator Bow and 5-shot Bolt Thrower.
effects: Divine Disfavor: Forced Slowed whilst shooting.
Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target
